zh.of Beaurepaire, Hampshire, England: 英國英格蘭哈普爾波奧派爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Bernard Brocas Jnr於大約1354年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾波奧派爾時，他的父親Sir Bernard Brocas26歲，母親Agnes Vavasour29歲。他於大約1378年與Joan de Middleton結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1390年在英國被列為knight。他去世於1400年2月2日在英國英格蘭米德萊可聖 馬萊波恩享年47歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦克里斯蒂 邱奇 格也福利亞斯 紐蓋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Bernard Brocas Jnr于大约1354年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾波奧派爾时，他的父亲Sir Bernard Brocas26岁，母亲Agnes Vavasour29岁。他于大约1378年与Joan de Middleton结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1390年在英国被列为knight。他去世于1400年2月2日在英国英格兰米德萊可聖 馬萊波恩享年47岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦克里斯蒂 邱奇 格也福利亞斯 紐蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: Brocas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 2  French: locative name from Brocas in Les Landes, SW France.

variants.name: Brookhouse
meanings: English: topographic name for a house by a stream, from Middle English brok(e) ‘brook’ + hous ‘house’, or a habitational name from a place so named, such as Brookhouse in Laughton (Yorkshire).

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Bernard Brocas Jnr was born about 1354, in Beaurepaire, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Bernard Brocas, was 26 and his mother, Agnes Vavasour, was 29. He married Joan de Middleton about 1378. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. In 1390, at the age of 37, his occupation is listed as knight in England. He died on 2 February 1400, in St Marylebone, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47, and was buried in Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Bernard Brocas Jnr est né environ 1354, à Beaurepaire, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Bernard Brocas, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Agnes Vavasour, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Middleton environ 1378. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. En 1390, à l’âge de 37 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est knight à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 2 février 1400, à St Marylebone, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Bernard Brocas Jnr um 1354 in Beaurepaire, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Bernard Brocas 26 und seine Mutter Agnes Vavasour 29. Er hat um 1378 Joan de Middleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1390, als er 37 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als knight in England aufgeführt. Er starb am 2. Februar 1400 im Alter von 47 Jahren in St Marylebone, Middlesex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Joan de Middleton circa 1378. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1390, all'età di 37 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come knight nel England. ja.lifeSummary: Sir Bernard Brocas Jnrが約1354年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアビーウレペアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Bernard Brocasは26歳，母Agnes Vavasourは29歳であった。約1378年にJoan de Middletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1390年，37歳の時，イギリスでの職業はknightと記録されている。彼は1400年2月2日にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックススト マリレボンで47歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンチリスト チャーチ グレイフリアルズ ニューガトにて埋葬された。

ko.Greyfriars Chuch, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크리스트 c후르치 그리프리아르스 뉴가트
ko.Beauepaire Manor, Sherborne St John, Ham: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 셔본 스트 존
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Bernard Brocas Jnr(이)가 대략 1354년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 보레파어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Bernard Brocas(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Vavasour(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1378년 Joan de Middleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1390년, 37세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국에서 knight이었다. 그는 1400년 2월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스 스트 마일레보니에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 크리스트 c후르치 그리프리아르스 뉴가트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Bernard Brocas Jnr nasceu aproximadamente 1354, em Beaurepaire, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Bernard Brocas, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Vavasour, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Middleton aproximadamente 1378. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1390, com 37 anos, sua profissão aparece como knight em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1400, em St Marylebone, Middlesex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Christ Church Greyfriars Newgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Beauepaire Manor, Sherborne St John, Ham: ширборн ст джон, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Bernard Brocas Jnr родился около 1354 г. в местности борепеир, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Bernard Brocas было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Vavasour, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Middleton около 1378 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. В 1390 году, в возрасте 37 лет,  он работал по профессии knight в местности Англия. Он умер 2 февраля 1400 г. в местности ст мэрилебоун, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности краист чурч грифрярс нюгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.
